add_voting_notes: Add notes about your voting decision
provide_detailed_feedback: Provide detailed feedback about this idea
batch_submit_description: Submit all your votes at once
no_ideas_description: There are no ideas available for voting at this time.
sessions_description: Manage and participate in jury voting sessions
no_sessions_description: You don't have any voting sessions assigned yet.
no_assignments_description: You haven't been assigned to any jury panels yet. Jury assignments are made by administrators for specific challenges.
jury_member_description: Jury members are evaluators selected to vote on ideas in specific challenges. As a jury member, you'll review ideas and cast votes based on predefined criteria.
assignment_process_description: Challenge administrators will invite you to join jury panels via email. Once invited, you'll receive voting access for the assigned challenges.
check_back_later: Check back later or contact an administrator if you believe you should have jury access
voting_session_closed: The voting session has been closed
challenge_not_in_voting_phase: The challenge is not currently in the voting phase
no_active_voting_session: No active voting session found for this challenge
no_active_session_description: There is currently no active voting session for this challenge. Please check back later or contact the challenge administrator.
drag_ideas_here: Drag ideas here to rank them
author: Author
select_ideas_prompt: Select ideas from the dropdown to compare them side-by-side
no_ai_insights: No AI insights available for this idea
deadline_warning: Voting deadline is {{date}}. Please complete your votes before then.
ranking_method_description: Drag and drop ideas to rank them from best to worst. Ideas with higher ranks will receive more points in the final tally using the Borda count method.
scoring_method_description: Assign a score from 0 to 100 to each idea based on its overall quality. Higher scores indicate better ideas. The final results are based on the average score across all jury members.
approval_method_description: Decide whether to approve or reject each idea. Approved ideas will advance to the next stage. The final results are based on the total number of approvals.
ranking_tip_1: Consider the overall innovation and feasibility of each idea
ranking_tip_2: Use the AI insights and evaluation scores as reference points
ranking_tip_3: Take your time to compare ideas before finalizing your ranking
scoring_tip_1: Be consistent with your scoring criteria across all ideas
scoring_tip_2: Use the full range of scores (0-100) to differentiate ideas
scoring_tip_3: Review AI insights and evaluation data before scoring
approval_tip_1: Focus on whether the idea meets the minimum criteria for advancement
approval_tip_2: Consider both strengths and weaknesses before deciding
approval_tip_3: Don't hesitate to skip and return to difficult decisions later
voting_method_not_supported: The voting method '{{method}}' is not supported.
